parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of gain applied to the signal, which influences the level of distortion.
parameters-en.Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ (50 Hz) of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Mid: Controls the midrange frequency EQ of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Mid Freq: Sets the frequency controlled by the Mid parameter--1 (220 Hz), 2 (450 Hz), 3 (800 Hz), 4 (1.6 kHz), or 5 (3 kHz).
parameters-en.Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ (5 kHz) of the tonestack.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the Preamp block. Unlike Master Volume, it has no effect on the block's tone.
parameters-en.Master: Controls the Master Volume of the amplifier.
parameters-en.Ultra Lo: When on, boosts the low end (40 Hz) output by 2 dB and simultaneously cuts the midrange (500 Hz) by 10dB.
parameters-en.Ultra Hi: When on, boosts the high end (5 kHz) output by 6 dB.
parameters-en.Bright: When on, boosts the high end response (2 kHz) of the input signal by 6 dB.
parameters-en.EQ: When on, enables the 9-band graphic EQ.
parameters-en.33Hz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.80Hz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.150Hz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.300Hz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.600Hz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.900Hz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.2kHz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.5kHz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.8kHz: Boost or cut up to 12 dB.
parameters-en.EQ Level: Controls the output level of the 9-band graphic EQ. If the EQ’d signal is too soft, turn EQ Level up; if it’s too loud, turn EQ Level down.
